message:
feat(persist): persist stream consumer groups and PEL state in RDB snapshots

Previously, RDB snapshots only saved stream entries and the watermark.
Consumer groups, their consumers, and pending entry lists (PEL) were lost
on restart. This commit adds full consumer group persistence:

- Add RdbStreamConsumerGroup and RdbStreamPendingEntry structs to fr-persist
- Extend RdbValue::Stream with a consumer groups vector
- Encode: group name, last_delivered_id, consumer list, pending entries
  (entry ID, consumer, delivery count, last delivery timestamp)
- Decode: backwards-compatible (old format decodes with empty groups)
- Add Store::stream_consumer_groups() accessor and restore_stream_group()
- Wire store_to_rdb_entries to snapshot consumer group state
- Wire apply_rdb_entries_to_store to restore consumer groups from RDB
- Add round-trip test for streams with consumer groups and PEL

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
